description: Dynamic profile name display - show actual active profile in PnL display instead of hardcoded SMART-HYBRID
steps: Update pnl_display.py: Add profile_name parameter to render() method, replace hardcoded SMART-HYBRID in _build_detail_line with dynamic profile_name, replace hardcoded Smart Hybrid Mode in footer with dynamic profile name
Update mt5_trader.py: Call mt5_config.reload_active_profile() on every display refresh, pass mt5_config.ACTIVE_PROFILE_DISPLAY to pnl_display.render() as profile_name parameter
acceptance_criteria: pnl_display.py render() method has a profile_name parameter
_build_detail_line shows the passed profile_name instead of hardcoded SMART-HYBRID
Footer shows the actual profile name instead of hardcoded Smart Hybrid Mode
mt5_trader.py calls mt5_config.reload_active_profile() before each display render
All Python files have valid syntax
verification: Run: python -c "import ast; [ast.parse(open(f'CCT_Rectangle_Bot/live_mt5/{f}').read()) for f in ['pnl_display.py','mt5_trader.py']]" to verify syntax
Run: grep 'profile_name' CCT_Rectangle_Bot/live_mt5/pnl_display.py to verify parameter added
Run: grep 'reload_active_profile' CCT_Rectangle_Bot/live_mt5/mt5_trader.py to verify reload call
